NCT02993523.label: Outcome
NCT02993523.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT02993523.text: At a median follow-up of 20.5 months, the median overall survival was 14.7 months in the azacitidine-venetoclax group and 9.6 months in the control group (hazard ratio for death, 0.66; 95% confidence interval, 0.52 to 0.85; P<0.001).

NCT03173248.label: Outcome
NCT03173248.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT03173248.text: Changes in weight were not significantly different in the two groups at the 12-month assessment (net difference, -1.8 kg; 95% CI, -4.0 to 0.4; P = 0.11).

NCT00651261.label: Outcome
NCT00651261.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT00651261.text: RESULTS: A total of 717 patients underwent randomization; 360 were assigned to the midostaurin group, and 357 to the placebo group.

NCT02577406.label: Outcome
NCT02577406.text: Overall, 319 patients were randomized to enasidenib (n = 158) or CCR (n = 161).
